params.dAppRecipient: Where to send the dApp's share
Where to send the dApp's share
params.token: The ERC-20 token in which the fee is denominated
params.totalFee: Total fee amount in token units

getActiveIlkCount().notice: Get number of active collateral types.

getIlkBreakdown().notice: Get collateral type breakdown for stability fees.

getIlkStabilityFees(bytes32).notice: Get stability fees for specific collateral type.

getMonthlyUBIEstimate().notice: Calculate estimated monthly UBI contribution from stablecoin protocol.         Target: $15K+ monthly from stablecoin operations.

getStablecoinSocialImpactRate().notice: Calculate stablecoin social impact rate.         Returns UBI generated per dollar of transaction volume.

getStablecoinUBIStats().notice: Get stablecoin protocol specific UBI statistics.

getTodayStablecoinImpact().notice: Get current day's UBI impact for real-time monitoring.

getUserMintingFees(address).notice: Get minting fees for specific user.

setGoodDollar(address).notice: Update the GoodDollar token address when redeployed

splitFee(uint256,address).notice: Split fees denominated in G$.         Called by dApps when fees are collected in GoodDollar tokens.

splitFeeToken(uint256,address,address).notice: Split fees denominated in any ERC-20 token (especially gUSD).         Called by VaultManager (stability fees) and PSM (minting fees).

splitGovernanceFee(uint256,address,addre.notice: Split governance fees (future enhancement).         Called when governance fees are implemented.

splitLiquidationPenalty(uint256,address,.notice: Split liquidation penalties (future enhancement).         Called when liquidation penalties are implemented as separate fees.

splitMintingFee(uint256,address,address,.notice: Split minting fees with enhanced tracking.         Called by PSM for USDC↔gUSD swaps.

splitStabilityFee(uint256,address,addres.notice: Split stability fees with enhanced tracking.         Called by VaultManager with detailed collateral type tracking.
